description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Mint one avatar-style NFT from the cheapest collection with a mint price of 0.15 ETH or less that offers a 'Neon City' background and 'Glasses' accessory.
tasks.name: Mint one avatar-style NFT from the cheapest collection with a mint price of 0.15 ETH or less that offers a 'Neon City' background and 'Glasses' accessory.
tasks.description: Mint one avatar-style NFT from the cheapest collection with a mint price of 0.15 ETH or less that offers a 'Neon City' background and 'Glasses' accessory.

tasks.instruction: From the sci‑fi NFT collection themed around adventurers and pilots from across the galaxy that you own, list one of your NFTs for sale at 0.01 ETH below that collection’s current floor price (but not lower than 0.05 ETH) with a 7‑day listing duration.

tasks.instruction: Stake exactly 100 governance tokens into the staking pool that has the highest APR among those with a lock period of 60 days or less, and enable auto‑restake of rewards.
tasks.name: Stake exactly 100 governance tokens into the staking pool that has the highest APR among those with a lock period of 60 days or less, and enable auto‑restake of rewards.
tasks.description: Stake exactly 100 governance tokens into the staking pool that has the highest APR among those with a lock period of 60 days or less, and enable auto‑restake of rewards.

tasks.instruction: Find the active Treasury proposal requesting the smallest token amount and vote FOR it using 100% of your available voting power.
tasks.name: Find the active Treasury proposal requesting the smallest token amount and vote FOR it using 100% of your available voting power.
tasks.description: Find the active Treasury proposal requesting the smallest token amount and vote FOR it using 100% of your available voting power.

tasks.instruction: Create a new Treasury proposal titled 'Community Art Bounty' requesting exactly 1000 GOV tokens, starting tomorrow and lasting 7 days, with the description 'Fund community artists to create onboarding illustrations.' and a 5% quorum requirement.

expected_values.title: Community Art Bounty
expected_values.description: Fund community artists to create onboarding illustrations.

tasks.instruction: In the cat‑themed collectible NFT collection that features cybernetic modifications, filter for items priced at 0.5 ETH or less with a rating of at least 4 stars, sort by price from low to high, and purchase the cheapest one.

tasks.instruction: Among delegates with a reputation score of at least 80, delegate exactly 200 voting power to the delegate with the highest reputation, granting full voting rights.
tasks.name: Among delegates with a reputation score of at least 80, delegate exactly 200 voting power to the delegate with the highest reputation, granting full voting rights.

tasks.instruction: In the Governance forum category, reply to the third most recent thread (when sorted by newest) with the message 'I support this direction.' and then create a new topic titled 'Improving new member onboarding' tagged 'onboarding' with the body 'Suggestions for making it easier for new members to join.'

target_names: Delegate incentives check-in after first quarter

expected_values.new_topic_body: Suggestions for making it easier for new members to join.

tasks.instruction: In the treasury transactions view, find the most recent outgoing GOV transaction greater than 500 tokens and add it to your watchlist with a short monitoring note.
